message:
feat(api,conformance): add gradient checkpointing, perf SLO framework, and E2E training tests

Implement gradient checkpointing in FrankenTorchSession (checkpoint method
that re-executes the forward pass during backward to trade compute for
memory), with tests verifying correct output and gradient equivalence.

Add performance SLO infrastructure to ft-conformance: perf_slo module with
measurement/gate report types, run_perf_slos binary for collecting latency
and allocation data across key workloads, and check_perf_slos binary for
gate evaluation against budget thresholds. Add allocation-counter as a
workspace dependency to support allocation tracking.

Add end-to-end training integration test (e2e_training.rs) exercising the
full stack from ft-data DataLoader through ft-nn, ft-api, ft-autograd,
ft-optim, and ft-serialize. Also includes minor formatting cleanups in
conformance custom-function tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

 [[package]]
